page: Amazon Web Services r8ib.32xlarge is a memory-optimized server instance belonging to the r8ib family. It is powered by dedicated Intel x86_64 processors running at a clock speed of 3.9 GHz. The instance features 128 virtual CPUs mapped to 64 physical cores, utilizing hyperthreading with 2.0 threads per core, and operates on the AWS Nitro hypervisor architecture.

This instance is equipped with 1024.0 GB of system memory, providing a resource density of 8.0 GB of RAM per virtual core. It does not include local storage, meaning all storage requirements must be met via external network-attached block storage. There are no onboard GPUs, making it a CPU-only compute node.

Networking capabilities include a baseline network bandwidth of 133 Gbps. The instance does not include complimentary public IPv4 addresses. Given the high memory-to-vCPU ratio and substantial network throughput, the r8ib.32xlarge is designed for memory-intensive workloads such as large-scale databases, in-memory analytics, enterprise resource planning systems, and large-scale data processing pipelines.
description: Amazon Web Services r8ib.32xlarge is a memory-optimized server instance powered by dedicated Intel x86_64 processors running at 3.9 GHz. Operating on the AWS Nitro hypervisor, it features 128 vCPUs across 64 physical cores and provides 1024.0 GB of system memory, yielding a ratio of 8.0 GB of RAM per virtual core. The instance does not include local storage or integrated GPUs, relying entirely on network-attached storage. It delivers a baseline network bandwidth of 133 Gbps. This hardware profile is designed for memory-intensive enterprise applications, in-memory databases, and large-scale data processing workloads that require significant memory capacity and high-speed network connectivity without the need for local physical disks.
og_description: Amazon Web Services r8ib.32xlarge is a memory-optimized instance featuring 128 vCPUs, 1024 GB RAM, and a 3.9 GHz Intel processor, designed for memory-intensive enterprise workloads.
meta_description: Amazon Web Services r8ib.32xlarge is a memory-optimized instance featuring 128 Intel vCPUs, 1024 GB RAM, and 133 Gbps baseline network bandwidth.
tagline: A memory-optimized virtual server featuring one terabyte of RAM, high-speed Intel processors, and robust network bandwidth for enterprise workloads.
bullet_points: 128 vCPUs and 64 physical cores powered by 3.9 GHz Intel processors
1024.0 GB of system memory providing high resource density
133 Gbps baseline network bandwidth for high-throughput data transfer
Built on the AWS Nitro hypervisor with dedicated CPU allocation
No local storage or GPUs, optimized for network-attached storage architectures
Suited for in-memory databases, large-scale analytics, and enterprise applications
